Added 2s GET /api/version preflight to OllamaProvider — fails fast with .providerUnreachable when ollama serve is down, hint to start it. Added isMCPContext()/aiRequestTimeoutSeconds() helpers; OllamaProvider+ClaudeProvider use 50s under MCP (PIPPIN_MCP=1 env var) vs 120s in CLI to stay under runChild 60s cap. MCPServerRuntime.runChild now sets PIPPIN_MCP=1 in child env. New error case .providerUnreachable preserves intent. 4 new tests including a fast-fail integration test against a closed port. 1638 tests pass.

pippin doctor --latency runs 3 Mail bridge probes: list/activity/search, each with a 20s soft cap inside the bridge so worst-case is bounded. classifyLatency thresholds: <20s ok, 20-55s warn (.skip with 'warning:' in detail), >=55s fail with remediation hint to restart Mail.app. Opt-in via --latency flag so default doctor stays fast. 5 new tests covering classifier boundaries. 1643 tests pass.

Added BatchBudget helper (pippin/BatchBudget.swift). MCP context: 50s wall-clock cap, returns partial results + warning when exceeded. CLI: unbounded. Wired into memos export --all and memos transcribe --all chunk loops — break out when exceeded, emit stderr warning naming completed/total counts. 5 new BatchBudget tests. 1648 tests pass.

Makefile now uses xcrun --sdk macosx for build/test so it routes through xcode-select. CLT-only macOS 26 hosts get a clear hint via the comment in Makefile + CLAUDE.md to install Xcode or export DEVELOPER_DIR. Local make test still passes (1648 tests).

Unified MailBridge SearchMeta/ListMeta/ActivityMeta + SearchResponse/ListResponse/ActivityResponse + SearchOutcome/ListOutcome/ActivityOutcome into ScanMeta/ScanResponse/ScanOutcome with typealiases preserving the legacy names. Removed ~80 lines of byte-identical duplication. All callers (MailWatchCommand, tests, simplify suites) compile unchanged via aliases. 1648 tests pass.

Removed try? from MessagesCommand.swift's 5 calls to MessagesAuditLog.record (function is non-throwing — append errors are swallowed internally). Same diff also cleans up adjacent StatusCommand.swift warnings: drop ?? '' on non-optional account.email, drop deprecated EKAuthorizationStatus.authorized comparisons (we target macOS 15+; .fullAccess is the canonical check). 1648 tests pass.

Added Input: Sendable, Output: Sendable constraints to runConcurrently<Input, Output>. SemanticSearchResult is implicitly Sendable (internal + Sendable fields). All callers (ActionExtractor, TriageEngine, SemanticSearch) compile cleanly. Sendable warning gone. 1648 tests pass.

BrowserBridge calls now hop off the cooperative pool via detachBlocking. BrowserRetry.run threads its operation closure through detachBlocking with @Sendable+Sendable Output constraints. All 8 BrowserCommand subcommands wrapped (Open/Snapshot/Screenshot/Click/Fill/Scroll/Tabs/Close/Fetch). Tests updated to use Sendable reference-counter pattern instead of captured var. 1648 tests pass.

Wrapped 7 sync AI provider call sites in detachBlocking: SummarizeCommand single-id path, MemosCaptureCommand, ActionsCommand (ActionExtractor.extract → runConcurrently → provider.complete chain), CalendarCommand smart-create + briefing, RemindersCommand smart-create, MailCommand list --summarize (TriageEngine) and show --sanitize (PromptInjectionScanner.scanWithAI). All callers now hop off the cooperative pool when invoking aiProvider.complete or descendant runConcurrently. tryGetSecret + JobRunnerInternalCommand left alone — bounded by 60s MCP cap and not user-visible. 1648 tests pass.

checkOllama now also probes /api/tags when the server is reachable and verifies the configured model (config.ai.ollama.model, default llama3.2) is in the list. Base-name fuzzy matching so gemma4:latest matches gemma4 and vice-versa. When missing: .fail status with a remediation that lists 'ollama pull <model>' AND a sample of what's actually available so the user can pick. 6 new pure-function unit tests for the matcher. 1654 tests pass.

Added NotesBridge.countNotes() — single Apple Event (app.notes().length) instead of iterating every note's body+plainText over JXA. StatusCommand.gatherNotesStatus uses it; pippin status duration on a 440-note vault dropped from 84s → 12.8s. New buildCountScript helper plus 4 tests asserting the count script does NOT iterate bodies, uses a single AppleEvent, honors folder filter, and escapes folder names with apostrophes. 1658 tests pass.

Bounded fetchRemindersSync wait at 15s (was unbounded -> infinite-hang risk); returns partial results + stderr warning on timeout. The cooperative-pool hop is the harder structural fix (EKReminder/EKEventStore are non-Sendable) and is tracked by pippin-91n (EventKit withTimeout wrapper).

Added MailBridge.clampHardTimeout: under MCP, list/activity/search ScriptRunner hard caps clamp to 55s (below the 60s runChild cap) so a wedged osascript self-reaps gracefully instead of being SIGKILLed. CLI keeps full cross-account-scaled values. 4 new unit tests. Fixed stale comment.

Already resolved: buildStatusReport() (containing the bounded 5s gatherRemindersStatus semaphore) is wrapped in 'await detachBlocking { buildStatusReport() }' at StatusCommand.swift:79 — the wait runs off the cooperative pool and is bounded. Verified, no code change needed.

Audit complete: both callers of OllamaEmbeddingProvider.embed/embedBatch already hop off-pool — SemanticSearch.search (embed) runs inside detachBlocking at MailCommand.swift:156/232, and embedBatch runs inside the continuation+DispatchQueue.global hop in MailIndex (MailAICommand.swift:103). No on-pool blocking remains.

Fixed the real deadlock in tryGetSecret (AIProviderFactory): stderr was an undrained Pipe() — a chatty get-secret (>64KB stderr) would block on a full buffer and hang waitUntilExit() forever. Now uses nullDevice stderr + concurrent stdout drain + 10s SIGTERM/SIGKILL timeout. The other probe sites (AudioBridge detectVersion/resolvePython3OnPath) use nullDevice stderr + emit tiny stdout (version string / path), so the >64KB deadlock cannot trigger there — verified safe-in-practice.

DoctorCommand.run already hops runAllChecks() via detachBlocking (line 46). The live cooperative-pool blocker was AudioCommand's guard AudioBridge.isAvailable() (4 sites), which probes via which + 'python3 -c import mlx_audio' subprocesses (~1-2s Python startup) BEFORE the detachBlocking — now hopped via 'await detachBlocking { AudioBridge.isAvailable() }'. Transcriber's isAvailable runs inside the already-hopped summarize/batch chains. Full suite 1662 tests green.

Investigated rigorously — NOT a real bug. With a properly-flushed input (44100 frames), the existing converter produces 15994 output frames at 16kHz: a 6-frame (0.375ms) tail, within resampler rounding. The reported '~72ms tail loss' was a measurement artifact (the diagnostic read the input file before its AVAudioFile writer flushed its final ~3140-frame buffer). The canonical .endOfStream-drain rewrite was prototyped and measured: it changes output by ~6 frames (sub-ms) since AVAudioConverter priming is 0/0 for LPCM input regardless of source codec (AVAudioFile decodes compressed formats to LPCM before the converter sees them). Not worth rewriting delicate working AVFoundation code for a sub-ms gain. Added a duration-preservation regression test (testConvertPreservesDuration) to guard against any genuine future truncation.

findEventByPrefix now dedupes matches by distinct calendarItemIdentifier (extracted to testable isUnambiguousPrefixMatch): recurring events (N occurrences, 1 identifier) resolve to their first occurrence; >1 distinct identifiers stay ambiguous. 4 unit tests added. Fixes calendar show/edit/delete <prefix> for repeating events.

Notes paginated path now detects when the requested window (offset+pageSize+1) exceeds NotesBridge.maxListLimit AND the fetch came back full — throws a clear ValidationError ('narrow with --folder') instead of silently slicing past a truncated 500-note fetch and falsely reporting done. Added named maxListLimit constant shared by the clamp and the guard. Proper native-JXA-offset pagination tracked as follow-up (pippin-pag).
Non-paginated SearchContacts.run now applies Array(contacts.prefix(limit)); help text aligned to 'Maximum results to return'. Consistent with calendar/notes search.
Added forceEmails param to ContactsBridge.convert; searchByEmail passes forceEmails:true so the matched address is always emitted regardless of --fields. build + 1667 tests green.

Fixed by commit dafe08e 'fix(mail): bound mail_list and mail_activity for MCP clients (#13)'. Both now apply the pippin-v1e soft-timeout pattern: JXA internal time check (_listStart/_activityStart) emitting meta.timedOut, ScanOutcome{messages,timedOut}, mcpHardTimeout clamping ScriptRunner caps to 55s under MCP (below the 60s runChild cap), and command-level timedOutHint warnings (MailCommand.List + MailActivityCommand). Verified: 41 tests green across MailBridgeListMetaTests/MailBridgeActivityMetaTests/MailBridgeHardTimeoutTests/MailBridgeSearchMetaTests/MailActivityTests. Issues were stale-open — fix landed but never closed.

Fixed by commit dafe08e 'fix(mail): bound mail_list and mail_activity for MCP clients (#13)'. Both now apply the pippin-v1e soft-timeout pattern: JXA internal time check (_listStart/_activityStart) emitting meta.timedOut, ScanOutcome{messages,timedOut}, mcpHardTimeout clamping ScriptRunner caps to 55s under MCP (below the 60s runChild cap), and command-level timedOutHint warnings (MailCommand.List + MailActivityCommand). Verified: 41 tests green across MailBridgeListMetaTests/MailBridgeActivityMetaTests/MailBridgeHardTimeoutTests/MailBridgeSearchMetaTests/MailActivityTests. Issues were stale-open — fix landed but never closed.

Aligned all toolchain-floor declarations to Swift 6.0 — the machine-enforced floor in Package.swift (swift-tools-version: 6.0 + .swiftLanguageMode(.v6)). Chose option (a): README.md:55 and :384 changed from 'Swift 6.2+' to 'Swift 6.0+' (README's prior 'Xcode 16+ / Swift 6.2+' was internally inconsistent — Xcode 16.0 ships Swift 6.0). copilot-instructions.md already said 6.0 (now correct, not wrong). Package.swift unchanged (canonical). Pure doc alignment, no code change. CI uses latest-stable Xcode so no minimum enforced there.

Normalized setup-xcode pins: .github/copilot-setup-steps.yml was pinning an older SHA (60606e2 # v1) vs the three main workflows (ed7a3b1 # v1.7.0); aligned it to ed7a3b1 so all four GitHub usages share one pin (satisfies action-pinning policy). Forgejo (.forgejo/workflows/ci.yaml) intentionally omits setup-xcode — it runs on a self-hosted macos runner with system-selected Xcode and the action is unavailable in Forgejo's registry; documented this with an inline NOTE rather than adding a no-op step. YAML validated.

Issue premise was partly outdated: both deps use .upToNextMinor(from:) (NOT open-ended from:), which already IS a declared conservative upgrade target — auto-accept patch releases within the current minor (argument-parser <1.8.0, GRDB <7.11.0), explicit PR required for a new minor. Package.resolved already records exact resolved version + git revision SHA for both (supply-chain hash-pin satisfied). Made the policy explicit with a comment in Package.swift's dependencies block documenting the held floors and that Package.resolved is the authoritative pin. Versions left UNCHANGED (1.7.0 / 7.10.0) per the issue's instruction. Manifest verified to parse.

Hardened NotesBridge buildListScript/buildSearchScript against the pre-existing sort cost. The earlier pre-sort time check (b53de65) only guarded a slow app.notes() FETCH; the dominant cost — a comparator firing an Apple Event per comparison (O(n log n) round-trips) — ran uninterruptibly and could blow the 35s ScriptRunner cap before any partial result returned. Fix: materialize each note's modificationDate exactly once into a time-checked JS array, then sort in pure JS (O(n) Apple Events, self-bounding via soft cap → partial results + timedOut=true). Extracted into shared jsSortNotesByModDate helper; results loop reuses cached ISO date. Tests: 4 regression assertions added; full suite 1669 green, lint clean.

Added scripts/lint-detach-blocking.py — an async-aware brace-stack analyzer that flags MailBridge.(read|list|search)* / MCPServerRuntime.runChild / sendSynchronousRequest / DispatchSemaphore calls inside async function bodies not lexically enclosed by detachBlocking { }. Strips comments/strings, handles same-line wraps, ignores sync helper funcs, supports // detach-lint:allow suppression, ships 8 self-test fixtures (--self-test). Wired into .github/workflows/ci.yml. Running it surfaced 10 real cooperative-thread-blocking gaps (MailCommand accounts/mailboxes/search×2/show/attachments, MailActivityCommand, DigestCommand×2, MailWatchCommand×2) — all fixed by wrapping in detachBlocking per the established pattern. Build + 1669 tests green.

Completed the doctor --latency probe set. list/activity/search probes + classifyLatency thresholds (20s warn/.skip, 55s fail) were already present; added the missing 4th probe from the spec: 'Mail.app ready latency' via new MailBridge.probeReady() (runs jsMailReadyPoll only, isolating Mail.app launch/sync time from per-query latency). Added as the first probe; updated --latency help (ready/list/activity/search, ~70s). runMailLatencyProbes() is invoked inside detachBlocking (DoctorCommand.run), so probeReady's bridge call is properly hopped. Build + 1669 tests green; detach lint clean.

Verified already implemented across all three sites (stale-open): DigestCommand appends a 'notes: scan timed out' entry to the top-level warnings array (DigestCommand.swift:134-135); ActionsCommand aggregates collectMailItems/collectNoteItems timedOut (run() lines 87/92) and emits it on the envelope via emitActions/emitResults(timedOut:); StatusCommand.gatherNotesStatus sets StatusReport.NotesStatus.timedOut = foldersOutcome.timedOut || countResult == nil (StatusCommand.swift:217). Notes Outcome.timedOut is no longer discarded anywhere.

Fixed: made collectMailItems/collectNoteItems static (taking account/limit params instead of self), and wrapped both calls in ActionsCommand.run() with detachBlocking so the blocking MailBridge.listActivity / NotesBridge.listNotes osascript subprocesses hop off the cooperative pool. Build + 1669 tests green; detach lint clean.

Lifted the duplicated Outcome<T> (results + timedOut + JXA back-compat decoder) into a shared pippin/Formatting/BridgeOutcome.swift. NotesBridge.Outcome and ContactsBridge.Outcome are now typealiases to BridgeOutcome<T>. Resolved the Notes(Decodable)/Contacts(pure-Swift) shape mismatch the issue flagged via Swift CONDITIONAL CONFORMANCE — extension BridgeOutcome: Decodable where T: Decodable — so Notes gets the JXA-JSON decoder and Contacts never exercises it (no coupling). MailBridge.ScanOutcome left separate by design (non-generic, 'messages'-named). Two divergent struct defs → one. Build + 1669 tests green (incl. Notes back-compat decode + Contacts construction tests).

Already implemented (stale-open). aiRequestTimeoutSeconds() (AIProvider.swift:41-42) returns 50s under MCP (isMCPContext/PIPPIN_MCP=1), 120s in CLI — below the 60s runChild cap so MCP clients get a clean .timeout instead of a SIGKILL. Both ClaudeProvider (26-36) and OllamaProvider (23-38) thread it into URLRequest.timeoutInterval + sendSynchronousRequest(waitTimeoutSeconds: timeout+5). OllamaProvider also implements option (b): a 2s GET /api/version preflight() (lines 58-79) that fails fast with .providerUnreachable + actionable 'ollama serve' hint when the server is down. Both options (a) MCP-mode timeout and (b) fast preflight are present.

Already implemented (stale-open). MemosCommand both batch paths use BatchBudget.forCurrentContext() (50s wall-clock cap under MCP, unlimited CLI): export --all (lines 168-226) and transcribe --all (318-420) iterate chunks, check budget.exceeded per chunk, set batchTimedOut + break, and emit a partial-results warning advising to narrow (smaller --jobs / re-run for remainder / per-memo). Covered by BatchBudgetTests.swift. Returns whatever completed instead of mid-batch SIGKILL at the 60s runChild cap — exactly the issue's ask.

Added native offset pushdown to Notes list pagination. buildListScript + listNotes gained an offset param; the JXA results loop now starts at offset (skips the first N sorted notes, returns only the limit window). NotesCommand.runPaginated switched from over-fetch(offset+pageSize+1)+in-memory-slice to native fetch(pageSize+1 @ offset) + Pagination.pageFromPushdown — mirroring MailCommand's established pushdown pattern. This lifts the old 500-note pagination ceiling (removed the 'Cannot paginate beyond 500' throw): body/plaintext fetches stay bounded to the page window, while the all-notes sort enumeration is bounded by the 22s soft cap (surfaced honestly as timedOut), not a fixed offset ceiling. Updated maxListLimit doc. Added 3 offset regression tests; full suite 1672 green, lint clean. NOTE: sorted pagination is inherently O(n) enumeration per page (must sort all to order); Apple Notes JXA has no efficient indexed slice, and the soft cap is the guard.

Makefile test target now preflights XCTest availability via 'xcrun --sdk macosx --find xctest': (1) found → run normally; (2) missing but Xcode.app installed → transparently re-run under DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer so 'make test' just works on a CLT-only-selected host; (3) neither → print an actionable error (install Xcode / set DEVELOPER_DIR, see pippin-ncr) instead of the cryptic 'no such module XCTest'. Combines with the pre-existing xcrun routing + CLAUDE.md/Makefile docs (the issue's other listed fixes). CI (macos-15, Xcode present) hits the fast path unchanged. Verified: full suite runs green via 'make test'.

Extended scripts/lint-detach-blocking.py to NotesBridge (JXA) and ContactsBridge (sync CNContactStore) entry points, with documented scope: VoiceMemosDB/GRDB (fast local SQLite) and EventKit Reminders/Calendar (async methods; internal wait tracked by pippin-91n) are intentionally excluded. Added 4 self-test fixtures. The extension surfaced 6 real cooperative-pool-blocking gaps in async commands — all fixed by wrapping in detachBlocking: ContactsCommand (listContacts, createContact, searchByEmail, searchByName, listGroups) and DigestCommand notes section (listNotes). Also added conditional 'extension BridgeOutcome: Sendable where T: Sendable' (public type needs explicit conformance to cross the detachBlocking boundary). NotesCommand correctly NOT flagged — it's a sync command (run() throws, not async). Build + 1672 tests green; lint + self-test clean.
Hardened parseRange (cap N at 3660 days + guard-let, fixes today+Int.max overflow trap) and appleNanos (clamp to Int64 bounds). 5 regression tests added, make ci green, pushed 32a6725.

VoiceMemo.init(row:) and deleteMemo now decode NULL Core Data columns optionally with fallbacks; deleteMemo guards empty-path to avoid deleting recordings dir. 3 regression tests, make ci green (1679 tests), pushed 0b7ed13.

requestTimeout(batch:) single-source helper: MCP→50s (under 60s child cap), CLI→120s/300s. Both call sites use waitTimeoutSeconds=timeout+5. 2 regression tests. make ci green (1681 tests). Pushed b2f2783.

clampLimit() normalizes to [0,100000] at all three query method entry points; negative→0 (no unbounded fetch), Int.max→100000 (no overflow trap). 5 regression tests. make ci green (1686 tests). Pushed b359ba3.

persistLocked() now runs inside the mutation lock so mutate+atomic-write is one ordered op; no out-of-lock snapshot, no lost-update race. Round-trip + 300-way concurrency stress tests added. make ci green (1688 tests). Pushed c5a701e.

resolve() caps pageSize at 100000; paginate() uses remaining-bounded take (no offset+pageSize overflow); pageFromPushdown() uses addingReportingOverflow → drops next cursor on overflow. 4 regression tests. make ci green (1692 tests). Pushed 3fca206.

exportWarnings() helper surfaces per-item failures + batchTimedOut as envelope warnings (agent) / stderr (json/plain); no longer silently dropped. 4 unit tests. make ci green (1696 tests). Pushed 537c6f4.

parseDateString sets locale=en_US_POSIX; TextFormatter.formatDate uses Calendar(identifier:.gregorian) (local tz preserved). Fixes non-Gregorian device calendar misparse/misrender. 4 tests (exact UTC epoch, Gregorian-year render). make ci green (1699 tests). Pushed 7c1bf2e.

ArgHelpers.option() binds --flag=value; optionIfString/optionIfInt + 8 inline option sites converted. Dash-prefixed option values (search bodies, bullet titles) no longer misparsed as flags. 3 new tests + updated argv-shape assertions. Positional case → pippin-bhn. make ci green (1702 tests). Pushed d78d34d.

ArgHelpers.appendPositionalLast() appends free-form positionals (search query, reminder title) LAST behind a -- separator across 6 buildArgs (mail/reminders/contacts/notes/messages_search + reminders_create). Empirically verified -- form parses. 2 regression tests. make ci green (1704 tests). Pushed 3892d71.

intValue now guards isFinite + Int64 range before Int64(Double); out-of-range MCP int args (1e19, huge literals) return nil (absent→default) instead of trapping the child. 8 unit tests incl. end-to-end decode→intValue. make ci green (1712 tests). Pushed 4a00c4d.

reminders due-before/after now exclude undated reminders (passesDueFilters); digest upcoming window anchored to endOfDay (full N days) + calendar-days bounded 1-366. 5 tests. make ci green (1717 tests). Pushed 0c87069.

reminders due-before/after now exclude undated reminders (passesDueFilters); digest upcoming window anchored to endOfDay (full N days) + calendar-days bounded 1-366. 5 tests. make ci green (1717 tests). Pushed 0c87069.

Substring injection patterns (systemPromptOverride/dataExfiltration/roleHijacking) now match via whitespace-tolerant regex (word\s+word) through regexMatches; sanitize() redaction preserved; threat-count semantics preserved (one match per phrase). 5 tests, 18 existing still pass. make ci green (1722 tests). Pushed f432fcd.
Fixed in v0.24.2: rewrote testJobIdGeneratesUniqueValues to space generations past the 1ms boundary + constant-suffix guard; verified 0 failures across 100 runs.
Bumped checkout v4→v5.0.1, action-gh-release v2.5.0→v3.0.0, cache v4.3.0→v5.0.5 to Node-24 releases (re-pinned SHAs); setup-xcode + codeql-action already Node 24

Shipped lighter scope: listReminders/searchReminders return Outcome<[ReminderItem]> with timedOut from the existing 15s fetch cap, surfaced via agent-envelope warnings + JSON/text parity + digest warnings. 1725 tests pass.
Shipped: typed exit codes (3/4/5/7/2) derived from AgentError.code; PippinExitCode.swift + tests + docs
Shipped: agent-info capability probe; tool_count parity-tested vs --list-tools
Shipped: --fields works in agent mode via shared FieldProjection + printAgentProjectedJSON; 3 dup impls consolidated; mail list --fields added
Shipped: MailBodyCache at readMessage seam; cache hit ~75x faster (1.3s→17ms); mail cache stats/clear/warm + mail show --no-cache

Shipped: mail list --preview now reads/writes through MailBodyCache via 2-pass metadata+batch-body-fetch; warm cache ~11× faster (7s→0.6s); --no-cache escape; shared jsExtractMessageRow fragment keeps cache coherent with mail show

Fixed: AudioBridge now builds the mlx-audio 0.4.2 stt.generate arg vector (--audio/--output-path/--format json), maps the parakeet alias to its HF id, and reads the transcript from the output file. 4 new unit tests + full suite (1771) pass; live E2E confirmed memos transcribe/summarize/capture work (summarize/capture's AI step needs a working LLM provider — gemma4 is separately broken). Legacy pre-0.4.2 path preserved.
Implemented + tested (9 unit tests, live OpenRouter E2E). Shipping in v0.27.0.

Fixed: per-error remediation via RemediableError protocol; Reminders/Calendar/Contacts access_denied no longer return Voice Memos FDA hint. Code stays access_denied (exit-code/MCP compat). 6 new tests, make ci green.

Centralized remediation resolution in RemediationCatalog.resolve(for:); agent + human CLI paths share it. Human-mode no longer leaks Voice Memos FDA hint for Reminders/Calendar/Contacts. Regression test asserts parity.
agentErrorCode now rejects non-identifier (foreign NSError/URLError) descriptions and emits stable 'unknown_error'; typed codes unchanged. 4 new tests.

Epic complete: embedded Info.plist usage descriptions, PermissionPrimer+model, pippin permissions command, init priming, doctor Messages check + not-determined→pippin permissions. 15 new tests, make ci green (1824 tests).
